title: rubus bullatus
intro: Rubus bullatus, also known as the boulder raspberry, is a rare and unique shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus bullatus include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and can also be consumed raw or dried to preserve its medicinal properties.
